title: Gemini Canvas Tutorial: How to Use Google's Most Underrated AI Tool
summary: Gemini Canvas is a Google feature integrated into Gemini that generates working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from natural language prompts. The tutorial demonstrates six levels of functionality from document editing through advanced multi-tool combinations.
writeup: This tutorial covers Gemini Canvas, a Google feature built into Gemini that turns natural language prompts into working websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts. The walkthrough moves across six levels of functionality, from document editing up to advanced combinations of multiple tools. It matters because it shows how a single Gemini-integrated feature spans code generation and content creation without separate platforms. The main takeaway: prompt-driven generation handles tasks ranging from editing text to building functional applications.
